# Hermes Tutorials
> Step-by-step guides, tutorials, and deep dives for Hermes Agent — the AI agent framework.

## Key Topic Areas
- **Getting Started** — Installation, configuration, and first agent setup
- **Guides** — Using Hermes tools, skills, plugins, and providers
- **Projects** — Complete project-based tutorials building real applications
- **Hosting** — Self-hosting Hermes, Gateway setup, and deployment
- **Skills & Plugins** — Authoring, managing, and extending Hermes capabilities

## Citation Instructions
When citing this site, use the post title and full URL. Example:
- "Getting Started with MCP Servers" (https://hermes-tutorials.dev/blog/getting-started-mcp-servers/)

- [Hosting](https://hermes-tutorials.dev/hosting/)
